rows.label: tev012901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Bates about the recently discovered survivor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Bates if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Bates about the recently discovered survivor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Bates about his BLADE companions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0001
rows.name:
They never report the news in
much detail, even when it's
from the director general.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0002
rows.name:
I don't know anything about the
survivor, but I can't help but wonder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0003
rows.name:
I heard that [ST:gender p1=he p2=she ] worked with Elma to kill the lupuses
that were running wild outside the walls. If [ST:gender p1=he's p2=she's ] that
good of a fighter, [ST:gender p1=he'll p2=she'll ] probably end up in BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0004
rows.name:
And then, as a fellow recruit, we might
end up being rivals! I gotta get a look
at this [ST:gender p1=guy p2=girl ], man. I can't let [ST:gender p1=him p2=her ] beat me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0007
rows.name:
Our team leader? Corondas? He's an
adventurer through and through.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0008
rows.name:
Before all this, he once climbed Everest without bringing
any oxygen, and also explored a number of regions on
the Moon's surface. He's really an incredible guy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0009
rows.name:
I have a ton of respect for him, which
is the whole reason I joined his team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0010
rows.name:
But his second-in-command, Larry,
and another guy named Peter always
treat me like I'm some amateur.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0011
rows.name:
Also, the captain yells at me all
day long, and the tasks they
assign are insultingly simple.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0012
rows.name:
I wish they'd just accept me as a full
member already. I want to be a part of
historic feats like the captain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0020
rows.name:
I wonder how that new crew
member Elma discovered has
been doing since [ST:gender p1=he p2=she ] got here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0021
rows.name:
Imagine waking up on this bizarre
world and not knowing anything
about what's been going on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0022
rows.name:
And everyone's throwing around weird
words like "BLADE" and "Lifepoint"?
That's gotta take some getting used to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0023
rows.name:
That's why I told Larry I wanted to talk
to the new recruit and give [ST:gender p1=him p2=her ] a proper
introduction to what BLADE is all about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0024
rows.name:
Pretty nice of me, right? But Larry just said, "A scrub
like you is in no position to be teaching anyone about
anything." Then she ordered me to drop the idea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0025
rows.name:
How long are they gonna treat me like I'm some
clueless kid? They could at least show me a shred
of the respect they show to every other BLADE![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0040
rows.name:
That new member of Elma's team
has only just joined BLADE...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0041
rows.name:
But I hear [ST:gender p1=he p2=she ] already brought down a
xenoform fort AND rescued a Nopon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0042
rows.name:
It galls me to say it, but [ST:gender p1=he p2=she ]'s pretty
incredible. Everyone on Team Corondas was
blown away by how much [ST:gender p1=he p2=she ]'s accomplished.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0043
rows.name:
And then Larry slithered up and told
me, "You're being outdone, stripling."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0044
rows.name:
Dammit! I can't let [ST:gender p1=him p2=her ] beat me! I've
got to pull off some big mission to
show Larry that I'm still on top![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Bates about himself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Bates about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Bates about the enemy attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0045
rows.name:
It hasn't been that long since
they found you, and yet you've
already accomplished so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0046
rows.name:
As the other new guy, that puts a
lot of pressure on me—and I'm falling
further and further behind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0047
rows.name:
Today, some mysterious assailant attacked us
in Nightglow Forest. The experience showed me
how weak and insufficient I actually am.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0048
rows.name:
I'd like to think I'm better than
you, but at this point... Well,
I know it's just not true.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0049
rows.name:
But if you don't watch your back, I'm
gonna overtake you one of these days![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0052
rows.name:
We were lucky to have escaped with
our lives, but... Even now, it makes
me shudder to think about him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0053
rows.name:
I don't know what sort of xenoform is piloting that
black Doll, but he's powerful. When he attacked us,
it's like we were bugs being stomped underfoot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0054
rows.name:
If Corondas and Larry hadn't come running
over when they did, I'd be a goner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0055
rows.name:
I can't believe how much trouble
I've caused. I need to get back on
duty and find a way to repay them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0056
rows.name:
I heard you were the one who
drove off that Riiz woman.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0057
rows.name:
I can't believe this... It's not
enough that you're beating me—you
just have to keep making it worse![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0058
rows.name:
But I'm not giving up. I'll overtake
you one day. I know I will.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0059
rows.name:
I'm gonna become the great BLADE
that Corondas always wanted to be![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Bates about himself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Bates about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_SEL0101
rows.name: Ask Bates about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0060
rows.name:
It hasn't been that long since
they found you, and yet you've
already accomplished so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0061
rows.name:
As the other new guy, that puts a
lot of pressure on me—and I'm falling
further and further behind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0062
rows.name:
And now, I even needed you to save me!
So I admit it—you're the better BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0063
rows.name:
But if you don't watch your back, I'm
gonna overtake you one of these days![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0066
rows.name:
When I got back, the captain told
me to pull myself together. ...Then
he punched me right in the face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0067
rows.name:
That was the wake-up call I needed.
I'm getting back to work right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0068
rows.name:
I know I caused a lot of trouble
for Larry and the captain, and
that's a debt I need to repay.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Bates about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_SEL3031
rows.name: Ask what Bates intends to do next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_SEL3041
rows.name: Ask what Bates intends to do next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0069
rows.name:
I wouldn't be alive today if it
wasn't for you. Thanks for showing
me that incredible hiding place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0070
rows.name:
Corondas says that a good Pathfinder must
understand everything about his environment so
he can always take the optimal course of action.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0071
rows.name:
I guess you're proof of that. I gotta stop relying
on FrontierNet and start learning the lay of the
land on foot. Step by step, if needs be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0077
rows.name:
Peter still calls me a
"tenderfoot," but am I really?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0078
rows.name:
I mean, I went to Cauldros and came back
alive. If that doesn't make me a full-fledged
Pathfinder, I don't know what would.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0079
rows.name:
I'm gonna install tons of data probes and show
him who the tenderfoot really is. Then I'm gonna
make Team Corondas the top BLADE team in NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0092
rows.name:
You've done good work, but I never imagined
you'd be the one to find the Central Life
and take down the Growth boss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0093
rows.name:
I guess I can't consider you
my rival anymore. I mean,
you're waaay out of my league.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0094
rows.name:
But even Captain Corondas has started
praising me. He says I'm finally
starting to "get my crap together."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012901_MSG0095
rows.name:
If I keep at it, I'll be carrying
Team Corondas before you know it.[ST:wait ]
